title: Spanish Noodle Pasta
description: A mildly pungent and springy Spanish dish featuring noodles and double-rise bread, low in sodium and perfect for meal prep. This recipe is a delicious and healthy option for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the double-rise bread into 1-inch thick slices and bake for 10 minutes.
Cook the noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic and onion until softened.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the sauce.
Serve the noodles hot, topped with sliced double-rise bread.
